title: Classy V.
body_html:
Classy V. is a warm, soft, and effortlessly classy fragrance, perfect for a woman who exudes elegance and sophistication. Its rich blend of sweet and warm notes creates an aura of comfort and luxury, making it a timeless scent for any occasion. This scent is warm, inviting, and effortlessly chic, making it a must-have for any classy woman’s collection.

Fragrance Notes:
Top Notes: Vanilla Orchid, Jasmine
Heart Notes: Brown Sugar, Tonka Bean
Base Notes: Amber, Musk, Patchouli

When to Wear It:
Everyday Elegance – Perfect for casual outings when you want a soft, cozy scent.

Romantic Evenings – Its warm vanilla and amber make it ideal for date nights.

 Work & Meetings – Sophisticated yet subtle, it adds a touch of confidence.

Cozy Nights In – A comforting scent for relaxed evenings and self-care moments.

Special Occasions – Its classy sweetness makes it perfect for elegant gatherings.
